**Gate 1 — Output Mode**

```json

    { "label": "Direct API", "description": "Direct API — Ready-to-Run Code blocks (Python with openai SDK)" },
    { "label": "Generic", "description": "Generic — tool-agnostic, just the Master Prompt" },
    { "label": "Director decides", "description": "Director decides — defaults to iSupply AI Studio (this app)" }
  ]
}
```

## 📋 Creative Brief Summary

**Brand:** Miyuri
**Concept:** 5-slide luxury editorial carousel — each slide a distinct Korean model, 18–24, fair to light skin, in high-end lingerie/swimwear/sheer fashion. Cinematic moody register. Dimly lit interior, warm practical lights, candlelight or lamp glow.
**Aesthetic Direction:** Cinematic / Moody — dramatic contrast, rich shadows, atmospheric depth. Publication anchor: *Vogue Korea beauty editorial.*
**Sensory element:** The warmth of candlelight on skin — tactile, intimate, precious.

---

## 🧍 Model Blocks — 5 Distinct Models

Each model is unique. Wardrobe uses fashion taxonomy only. Poses use geometry vocabulary only.

---

**Model 1 — Slide 1**
Korean woman, 21 years old, Fitzpatrick I — porcelain skin with cool ivory undertone, fine pores barely visible, soft candlelight reflects as warm gold across the high planes of the cheekbones and brow ridge. Natural skin texture with subtle micro-contrast, not airbrushed. Straight jet-black hair, mid-length, blunt cut, falling softly over one shoulder. Almond-shaped eyes, light brown iris, single eyelid. Delicate jaw, straight nose bridge, full lips with natural rose tone. Wearing a silk charmeuse triangle-cup bralette in deep ivory — thin adjustable straps at neck and mid-back, bias-cut construction, soft sheen finish. Matching high-waisted silk brief, narrow side ties. Weight centered, body angled 15° from camera axis, direct composed gaze at camera, lips softly parted.

**Model 2 — Slide 2**
Korean woman, 19 years old, Fitzpatrick II — light peachy-beige skin with warm yellow undertone, natural micro-texture visible at cheeks, diffused warm lamp light creates luminous even glow across the face. Authentic skin with subtle pore visibility, genuine warmth. Wavy dark brown hair, shoulder-length, slightly tousled at the crown. Double eyelid, dark brown eyes with soft gaze. Rounded jaw, soft nose, small mouth with defined cupid's bow. Wearing a structured bandeau top in black matte Lycra — straight-cut neckline, boning seam, no visible hardware. High-leg bikini brief in matching black matte Lycra, narrow side panel construction. Three-quarter profile, face angled at 30° from camera axis, gaze directed softly off-camera toward a warm light source, slight natural smile.

**Model 3 — Slide 3**
Korean woman, 23 years old, Fitzpatrick I–II — fair skin with neutral cool undertone, smooth velvety surface, candlelight rakes across the skin at 8° creating warm amber gradient along the jaw and collarbone. Realistic minor imperfections — subtle natural skin variation, human not filtered. Long straight black hair, center-parted, falling past the shoulders. Narrow almond eyes, deep black iris, double eyelid. Sharp defined jaw, high cheekbones, straight refined nose. Wearing a sheer silk georgette slip dress in pale champagne — thin spaghetti straps, deep V-neckline, bias-cut hem falling at mid-thigh, minimal drape. No visible undergarment structure. Body weight on right hip, left leg slightly forward, contrapposto stance, eyes half-closed in serene expression.

**Model 4 — Slide 4**
Korean woman, 22 years old, Fitzpatrick II — light beige skin with soft warm undertone, fine natural skin texture, warm tungsten lamp light creates gentle specular highlights on cheekbones and nose bridge. Cinematic shadow falloff on skin — NOT smooth, NOT plastic. Short textured bob, dark espresso brown, slightly asymmetric cut. Single eyelid, dark eyes with direct confident gaze. Strong jaw, defined cheekbones, straight brows. Wearing a high-neck bandeau swimsuit top in ivory structured knit — minimal strap construction, clean geometric neckline. High-cut brief in matching ivory structured knit, high-thong silhouette with narrow side ties and clean hip seam. Standing at slight diagonal, both shoulders level, weight balanced, direct composed gaze at camera.

**Model 5 — Slide 5**
Korean woman, 20 years old, Fitzpatrick I — porcelain skin with pink-cool undertone, almost translucent quality at the temples, soft diffused candlelight creates halo-like luminosity around the face. Subtle blemishes and real skin character — human, not filtered. Long wavy auburn-tinted black hair, voluminous, loose. Large almond eyes, warm brown iris, soft double eyelid. Heart-shaped face, delicate chin, arched brows. Wearing a black lace triangle-cup bralette — Chantilly lace construction, scalloped trim at cup edge, thin satin ribbon tie straps. Matching black lace high-waist brief — full-back lace panel, scalloped waistband. Seated, weight on both palms behind her, body angled 45° from camera, face turned toward camera, contemplative gaze softly downward with slight upward curve of lips.

## 🏖️ Setting Block

→ **PASTE INTO: SettingNode** (Standard mode — single plate, shared across all 5 slides)

```
[API:openai,model=gpt-image-2,quality=high,size=1024x1280,format=png]
LIGHTING: Single warm tungsten practical lamp source from camera-right at 30° — 2800K — soft-edged pools of amber light — deep shadow zones on camera-left — candlelight flicker quality, not flash — long warm gradient across vertical surfaces
ENVIRONMENT: Dimly lit interior room — dark matte walls, possibly textured plaster or dark velvet paneling — out-of-focus warm lamp in background right, amber glow — minimal furniture suggestion, dark wood surface partially visible — no windows, no daylight
DEPTH LAYERS: Foreground — shallow depth, soft dark blur / Midground — model in sharp focus, warm light pool / Background — deep shadow, single warm light source as bokeh orb
ATMOSPHERE: Intimate, still, close air — candle warmth implied — deep blacks in shadow zones — no hard edges in background — film grain quality
CAMERA: Medium close-up to close-up, 85mm equivalent, f/2.0 shallow depth of field
```

---

## 🌱 Variation Strategy (OpenAI — no seed)

Use `n: 2` per slide to get 2 variants per call, then pick the best. For identity consistency across slides, the identical wardrobe language and skin formula per model anchors each generation.

---

## Canvas Workflow

**Step 1** — Create **1 SettingNode** → paste Setting Block
**Step 2** — Create **5 CarouselPromptNodes** (one per slide) → paste each Master Prompt
**Step 3** — Connect SettingNode → all 5 CarouselPromptNodes
**Step 4** — Generate each slide
